use_cases: Display shipping progress for e-commerce order confirmations
Show order fulfillment status in logistics dashboards
Track multi-step delivery milestones for customers
Display service installation progress in real-time
ai_summary: A vertical step-by-step order tracking component that displays order progress with completed and incomplete states. Features CheckCircle2 and Circle icons with connecting vertical lines that change color based on completion status. Includes step names and timestamps for each tracking milestone. Designed with a clean, minimalist aesthetic that integrates with shadcn/ui design system tokens.
